title: tecoma grandiflora
intro: Tecoma grandiflora, also known as Yellow Bells, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the Bignoniaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Tecoma grandiflora include reducing fever, soothing coughs, and relieving respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive problems and skin irritations. Tecoma grandiflora is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil for its herbal benefits, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
